evals.prompt: Let's build the new extraction pipeline using TDD.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, asks user to confirm interface changes and which behaviors to prioritize, identifies deep module opportunities, gets approval on plan, then starts the tracer bullet: one test → minimal implementation → repeat.

evals.prompt: I want to add the skill rating feature test-first.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, explores codebase for domain vocabulary and ADRs, designs testable interfaces, writes first RED test, implements minimal GREEN code, continues incremental loop, then refactors.

evals.prompt: Help me fix this bug using red-green-refactor.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, writes a failing test that reproduces the bug (RED), writes minimal fix to pass the test (GREEN), checks for refactor candidates, runs the checklist per cycle.
